sglang.title: [router] harden retries + metrics; fix streaming load; header filtering
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Reliability: stop retrying on non-429 client errors; avoid sending requests with empty worker URL; add small backoff between retries.
Metrics: consolidate success metrics at the routing layer to prevent double-counting; preserve streaming behavior.
Load tracking: ensure decrement on streami

sglang.title: Fix kimi k2 function call format
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Remove the space after functions.{func_name}:{index} in the template.
Otherwise, xgrammar will mask all tokens as invalid, then the probability becomes NaN, and the engine will sample negative token ids.

sglang.title: [router] add metrics for worker and policy
sglang.author: tonyluj
sglang.bodyExcerpt:

Currently, sgl-router implements metrics to track certain key indicators, but some of them are not being used.
By adding worker health and load in BasicWorker, and recording the request and policy decisions, it becomes easier to troubleshoot request and performance issues, especially when

sglang.title: [router] reduce radix tree contention, fix radix tree double-count race
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Tightens the multi-tenant radix tree’s correctness and reduces lock contention with low-risk changes:

Eliminates double-increment races in tenant_char_count.
Avoids unnecessary write-oriented locks in read paths.
Hardens eviction/removal logic against underflow and panics.

Checklist

 Form

vllm.title: [Misc] DeepGEMM : Avoid JIT generation in the hot-path
vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
DeepGemm JITs the its GEMM kernels. This JIT generation depends on the Gemm input tensor shapes. We want to avoid generating JITs during actual model inference. To this effect, this PR introduces a "Kernel Warmup" phase during which all the DeepGEMM kernels are invoked with possible input sh

vllm.title: Fix loading of quantized BigCode models
vllm.author: eldarkurtic
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Loading of GPTBigCodeForCausalLM is broken due to the missing prefixes and incorrect treating of scales for QKV layers (i.e. c_attn.weight_scale, which are merged into a single matrix). Before this PR quantized models would produce garbage output.
After this PR quantized models are matching the BF16

vllm.title: [TPU] Add support for online w8a8 quantization
vllm.author: kyuyeunk
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Expand existing online w8a16 quantization to support w8a8

Using {'activation_scheme': 'dynamic'} utilizes dynamic activation quantization
Using {'activation_scheme': 'none'} utilizes weight only quantization

vllm.title: [ROCm][Misc] Rename the context_len to seq_len in ROCm custom paged attention kernel
vllm.author: charlifu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: I suppose we are using seq_len to represent the size of whole input sequence, including query. But in the ROCm paged attention kernel, context_len is being used. This PR removes the inconsistence.
